prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='CWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='DWT_rf', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.02) with DWT_rf dominating early horizons while CWT_catboost excels at late horizons. Seasonality capture varies substantially across models (variance=0.67), indicating different decomposition approaches. The upward trend is consistently captured by CWT-based models, supporting DBA combination as the optimal method to leverage complementary strengths.

Seasonality capture varies substantially across models (variance=0.67), indicating different decomposition approaches. The upward trend is consistently captured by CWT-based models, supporting DBA combination as the optimal method to leverage complementary strengths."

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.02) with DWT_rf dominating early horizons while CWT_catboost excels at late horizons. Seasonality capture varies substantially across models (variance=0.67), indicating different decomposition approaches. The upward trend is consistently captured by CWT-based models, supporting DBA combination as the optimal method to leverage complementary strengths.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=7 indicates high horizon heterogeneity requiring per-horizon selection methods. RMSE spread_ratio=1.02 and relative_spread_mean=0.08 suggest moderate disagreement favoring DBA combination (recommended_method_hint). With n_windows=3, small top_k=3 with shrinkage=0.35 prevents overfitting. DWT_rf (RMSE=4196) and CWT_catboost (RMSE=4245) are tier1 champions; best_per_horizon captures their complementary strengths across horizons.
